entry.title: Re: Log based replication to HANA cloud with SAP Cloud Connector
entry.content: Remote table replication solution using Cloud connector is for HANA database only. for other applications, SDI with DP agent adapters is used.

entry.title: Brazil nota fiscal inbound vs outbound
entry.content:
Hi NF-e experts,

I am looking for experience feedback on how to organize support for nota fiscal.

My CIO (based in the USA) has this "great" idea that since both inbound and outbound invoices are named "nota fiscal", it should be the same group of people who support (bug fixing, enhancements) both inbound invoices and outbound invoices.

My understanding is that inbound invoices are usually supported by people who have a MM-PUR background, while outbound invoices are supported by people with more of a SD/OTC background. I am not saying that people with both skillsets do not exist, but as far as I know they tend to be the exception more than the norm.

Do you have experience of a single team supporting both inbound and outbound invoices, or is the standard way of doing things splitting the responsbility? Thanks for your feedback!

entry.title: Re: Steampunk is going all-in
entry.content:
Hi,

How to configure Embedded Steampunk on S/4HANA 2023 FPS01 - RISE Private Cloud?

After install ADT, how create a  abap cloud project  type S/4HANA  cloud abap  environment? What´s abap service instance url?

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2023
entry.content:
Hi Team,

In TUB 141 we have Vermont Child Care Contribution Special Fund, Where employee are subjected to 2 new tax types which is listed below.

EE CHILD CARE CONTRIBUTION: TAX TYPE 123.
ER CHILD CARE CONTRIBUTION: TAX TYPE 124.

Please do let me know when SAP is planning on releasing these 2 new tax types.

 

Thanks and Regards,

Hemanthkumar

entry.title: Re: Steampunk is going all-in
entry.content:
Hi,

You can check the site developers.sap.com . There is several tutorials to start a project, with installation ADT, connection, etc.

Other link relevant is the next: https://community.sap.com/t5/developer-extensibility/developer-enablement-resources-for-developer-extensibility/ta-p/227194 

regards

entry.title: Purchase request function not showing in SAP Business One client
entry.content:
Hi ALl,

 

I am experiencing an issue where I cannot see the Purchase Request function in the SAP Business One web client (B1 Version: 10.0.190.FPO2202). I noticed this while testing some approval processes. Additionally, I believe this issue is related to the fact that the approval pending notification is popping up, but nothing is opening. When I tried the same process with a Purchase Order, it worked fine. I have checked the setup to see if there are any specific settings or authorizations required separately for the web client, but I couldn't find anything.

 

Looking forward to your expertise on this at the earliest.

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2023
entry.content:
Hello @graziela ,

Alabama DOR proposes tax exempt overtime wages (/PPE) be reported in box 14 on the W-2. Its not clear if this is required. Will SAP be providing a solution for this?

Thanks,

Mae

entry.title: Re: OData services stopped working after deployment of plugin
entry.content:
@naveenvishal

Let me confirm the following points:

  • Is it only the /User API that fails to connect out of the two APIs (/User, /Background_SpecialAssign)?
  • You mentioned that errors occur in the "production" environment. By "production," do you mean the Cloud Foundry Runtime, or do you mean that it only fails in the prod environment among multiple Cloud Foundry Runtime environments (dev, qas, prod)?
  • Do you see any error logs in the backend ? (by command `cf logs <your-service-name> --recent')

entry.title: Supplier Invoice Line Copy
entry.content: Is there any functionality in the supplier network where a supplier could copy an existing invoice line vs. creating new each time?  Doesn't look to be out of the box but is there any customization option?

entry.title: Re: SAP CodeJam Topics
entry.content: @mmoisa I'm sorry but that's not a topic we'd be able to cover with a CodeJam.

entry.title: Re: Posting period locked; specify an alternative date [M...
entry.content: We solved the issue posting two months later on september instead of july which was when the invoice was issued. Also we tried to post on august but the same error appeared.

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA 2023 FPS00 Upgrade
entry.content:
SAP FIORI FES 2023 FOR S/4HANA, 2023 is not supported as Gateway standalone and needs HANA DB

Also can't upgrade from SAP FIORI FES 2020 to SAP FIORI FES 2023

how did you overcome FES limitations

Regards

entry.title: Re: OData services stopped working after deployment of pl...
entry.content:
Hi @MioYasutake ,

Please find the details:

  • Is it only the /User API that fails to connect out of the two APIs (/User, /Background_SpecialAssign)? The other API I cannot check until we bypass User API call. User API call is before we save to pull SF data and /Background_SpecialAssign when we save the data.
  • You mentioned that errors occur in the "production" environment. By "production," do you mean the Cloud Foundry Runtime, or do you mean that it only fails in the prod environment among multiple Cloud Foundry Runtime environments (dev, qas, prod)? I meant CF Runtime as we have only 1 (Dev) environment where I am test-building the application. 
  • Do you see any error logs in the backend ? (by command `cf logs <your-service-name> --recent') -> Please find attached below the file with errors

Thank you,

Naveen Vishal

entry.title: Re: OData services stopped working after deployment of plugin
entry.content:
Hi @MioYasutake ,

Please find the details:

Is it only the /User API that fails to connect out of the two APIs (/User, /Background_SpecialAssign)? The other API I cannot check until we bypass User API call. User API call is before we save to pull SF data and /Background_SpecialAssign when we save the data.

You mentioned that errors occur in the "production" environment. By "production," do you mean the Cloud Foundry Runtime, or do you mean that it only fails in the prod environment among multiple Cloud Foundry Runtime environments (dev, qas, prod)? I meant CF Runtime as we have only 1 (Dev) environment where I am test-building the application.

Do you see any error logs in the backend ? (by command `cf logs <your-service-name> --recent') -> Please find attached below the file with errors.

Thank you,

Naveen Vishal

entry.title: When migrating sales order data by Migrate Your Data-Migration Cockpit app.The following warning
entry.content:
Hi All,
When migrating  sales order data by Migrate Your Data-Migration Cockpit app,
The following warning occurs.
"Sheet Schedule Line Data, column 'Order Quantity in Sales Units' : Row xxx will be truncated during transfer."
(Message Class:DMC_MD_INTERPRETER / Message Number:37)The sales unit for the relevant order is KGM, and the order quantity holds two decimal places.Is it not possible to migrate data if the sales unit is KGM and the order quantity has decimal places?
Please help.

entry.title: Re: SAC - Data Import API
entry.content:
Hi - Am also having the same issue . 

Have also tried populating the JSESSION and VCAP values in the header . 

Am currently implementing this API in ABAP AS - 7.5 .

Please let me know , if you have the solution.

Regards

Srini

entry.title: Mass download billing document pdf output
entry.content:
Hi all,

how can we mass download billing documentd pdf output?

Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Mass download billing document pdf output
entry.content:
Dear customer,

In S/4HANA Cloud, we cannot mass download PDF via the UI of the system. However instead, you can consider utilizing the following API service to mass fetch the PDFs of invoices.

Billing Document - Read, Cancel, GetPDF | SAP Help Portal

You can download the PDFs massively by coding a loop logic in your external system.

entry.title: How to disable Background Processing in workflolw setp
entry.content:
Hello guys, I need to add an Expression in my workflow setp but is showing disable:

If I go to control tab I can see the next:

The thing is that if I go to the task, is not setting as Background processing:

could anyone can help me?

entry.title: Re: How to use ABAP Test Cockpit (ATC) in the cloud as a developer in an on-premise system
entry.content:
Hi @OlgaDolinskaja,

Thanks for this! This will be helpful on our development. I already done the all the configuration and tested SLIN_SEC and FUNCTIONAL_DB as the Check Variant. It all went well but when I tried to create a custom check variant in the Central ATC check system (cloud) that is a copy of SLIN_SEC or FUNCTIONAL_DB, I got an error in the Checked system "Tool failures possibly caused incomplete result - see longtext" Message no. SATC_ABAP_CHECK410. Is there any missing configuration that needs to be done?

Regards,

Manuel

entry.title: Re: CONFIG.READ_CALUCATED_MEMBER_VALUES
entry.content: In system -> About, if you are not seeing a section for 'HANA Cloud version, then it's not on HANA Cloud

entry.title: Re: fields ssavd and ssevd operation
entry.content: Have you found a solution? I also have the same problem. If you have found a solution please let me know.

entry.title: FB05 Clearing by Doc number + Line Item
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to clear Documents using FB05 ( Incoming Payment ) with the combination of Document Number and Line Item.

Now Line Item is not available by Default as you can see below:

Hence, I changed the config using transaction OF71 and added the additional option of Line Item and now the screen shows the following:

Now the problem here is when I just put the Document Number e.g. in this case let's say 9900000001 it comes back with 4 items (as it rightly should) as shown below:

But the reason I included line-item option (using OF71) in the selection is basically to filter out the unwanted or unneeded line items for posting.

So now when I re-try with both the Document Number and Line Item as shown below:

First Choosing the Document

Then going to Process Open Item

Then clicking on Other Selection and then Choosing Line Item and then entering the value 001. 

Now my expectation over here is when I Click on Process Open Items; I should just see 1 line and not 4.

But this is what I get:

It returns a combination of Document Number OR Line Item rather than doing Document Number & Line Item.

Is there a way to achieve the following that when I enter Document Number & Line Item; it looks for exactly that combination?

Regards,

Pablo Ghosh Roy

entry.title: Re: How to Enable Multiple Selection Mode in a Data Table...
entry.content: Restricitng editing to a subset of columns is a feature that will be introduced in the next release.

entry.title: Configuration for PR to PO
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Scenario - 1  I will create sales order and automatically PR will be created. Let's say my supplying plant is A. If plant A has stock then it will allow to create delivery, PGI and billing.

Scenario - 2 I will create sales order and automatically PR will be created. In plant A, there is no stock so stock deficit issue will happen during PGI.

In this 2nd scenario, i want to transfer stock from other plant, let's say Plant B.

So here Plant B is my supplying plant and Plant A is my receiving plant.

With reference to the PR, PO should create and stock transfer should happen plant B to Plant A

Once stock transfer is done,  then I will be able to do PGI for the scenario - 2.

Here storage location is same but different plants in stock transfer process.

NOTE : Scenario - 1 & Scenario - 2 should happen in a single transaction.

Please find below sketch

 

I need complete configuration so as to execute the transaction as per my requirement.

entry.title: Demo mode link appears as a tiny dot in SEN book page
entry.content:
Hi guys,

When I try to insert a Demo Mode Link in a book page, it appears as a red colored tiny dot. I also tried to increase its width and height in Playback settings -> Book Page Fallback Defaults -> Link Buttons -> Demo Mode Link. It is uneditable. Refer below screenshot.

I created a new book page and I can see the Demo Mode Link button. But in this specific book page, we are unable to see it.

Any suggestions please...

entry.title: Re: Working with Object Tables in SAP Mobile Development Kit
entry.content: Thank you! I've recently got the debugger working, and I can see exactly how this works 🙂 Thanks Bill!

entry.title: Re: Microsoft Lists integration with SAP Datasphere
entry.content: @klorn_pallier- not that I am aware of. Be great if there was!

entry.title: Performance impact on database from remote source connection
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

For context, I need to aggregate data across multiple databases into an HDI container. To achieve this, I am creating remote source connections from several databases to a single database. This single database hosts an HDI container that facilitates data aggregation.

Currently, there will be around 4 databases (and corresponding remote source connections), with the possibility of more in the future. These 4 databases will frequently perform INSERT operations, and given that the remote source connections are real-time, these changes will be reflected in the single database as well.

I want to understand if there will be any performance-related issues for the single database under this setup. Any opinions or help would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks!

entry.title: The overruling information is reset when an update is done to the delivery document
entry.content:
Hello,

the SAP note: 2845239 - Issues with propagation of blocks from FWO to FU, TU, FO, FB - SAP for Me  , explains the below problem:

After setting the "Overrule Block" checkbox for a propagated block in the Freight Unit / Transportation Unit or Freight Order / Freight Booking, the overruling information is reset when an update is done to the predecessor business document that is the origin of the propagated block.

 

And it's recommended to implement the note for correcting this but this is in "Cannot be implemented" status.

Can anyone help me on this. Actually I am passing the blocking information from delivery to FO and when I make any changes to the delivery (after overruling the block), the overruling indicator is reset and the block again appears in FO.  

 

Thanks

Stalin

entry.title: Re: Extending the ABAP CDS extractor
entry.content:
seems no other way, but you are lucky, only two layers.

not sure if extractor has special way to extend.

entry.title: Re: Process order integration with DMC
entry.content: @ manoelcosta surely will check and revert back !! i Understand no configuration is required with the pre-requisities mentioned in the help, it should get transfered

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative May 2024 Bootcamp Guide
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano ,

My name is Ryan and I am currently an ERP consultant of a local ERP products of a VN consultant firm. I am pursuing to become of SAP consultant in next year, I think this opportunity would be an amazing way to start me on a new career as an SAP solution designer.


I believe this digital skills initiative is an excellent opportunity to give back and assist others in taking the first step toward transforming their lives. While I am committed to staying motivated in my own learning, I find it even more crucial to pledge to pass on my knowledge and experience, helping to educate others when the opportunity arises.

Thank you for this wonderful opportunity.

Ryan

entry.title: Re: Unlocking the Power of RSUSR_LOCK_USERS Report in SAP
entry.content: @Sandra_Rossi Thanks for highlighting/adding this! Thanks for sharing the SAP Notes as well!

Hi，
This document is very helpful!

howereve, i encouter same issue same with above. I have not found "N" and "O" in billing catergory.
I use SAP S4/HANA.

Please suggest how to activate this function. 

Thanks

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition ABAP开发案例之三：使用ADT自定义CDS视图
entry.content:
我们将发布一系列在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition 的 ABAP 环境中的开发案例。本篇是该系列的第三个开发案例，使用 ADT 自定义 CDS 视图。在我们开始之前，您可以阅读这篇 Blog 来了解我们这一系列的全部案例，希望我们的 Blog 可以为您在公有云三系统的探索中带来一些有价值的洞察。接下来就让我们开始吧！

1     场景需求

为了将交付、定价、税收和成本信息整合到一个数据模型中，并在嵌入式SAC故事中以表格形式进行可视化，需要创建一个分层的数据模型。在3SL系统之前可以通过Key User Extension 来生成CDS，但是其灵活度远不如直接在ADT中使用Coding开发出来的CDS。

1.1      数据来源I_DeliveryDocumentITEM

在ADT中打开 I_DeliveryDocumentITEM Delivery Document Item，当前CDS主要从Lips取值，并且关联到了许多其他的CDS。

           

 

 

           

 

 

 

1.2      字段定义

直接从底层CDS引用的字段如下：

Output Field

Field Desc

FieldPath

DeliveryDocument

交货

I_DeliveryDocumentItem.DeliveryDocument

DeliveryDocumentItem

项目

I_DeliveryDocumentItem.DeliveryDocumentItem

ActualDeliveredQtyInBaseUnit

销售数量

I_DeliveryDocumentItem.ActualDeliveredQtyInBaseUnit

BaseUnit

计量单位

I_DeliveryDocumentItem.BaseUnit

Product

物料编码

I_DeliveryDocumentItem.Product

ActualGoodsMovementDate

实际货物移动日期

I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.ActualGoodsMovementDate

SoldToParty

客户（外部）

I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.SoldToParty

DeliveryDocumentType

交货类型

I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType

ReferenceSDDocumentItem

参考项目

I_DeliveryDocumentItem.ReferenceSDDocumentItem

ReferenceSDDocument

参考凭证

I_DeliveryDocumentItem.ReferenceSDDocument

CustomerName_Sold

客户名称（外部）

I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument._SoldToParty.CustomerName

ReferenceSDDocumentCategory

参考凭证类别

I_DeliveryDocumentItem.ReferenceSDDocumentCategory

SalesDocumentDate

凭证日期

I_DeliveryDocumentItem._ReferenceSDDocument.SalesDocumentDate

CompanyCode

公司代码

I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument._SalesOrganization.CompanyCode

SalesOrganization

销售组织

I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.SalesOrganization

ValuationArea

评估范围

I_DeliveryDocumentItem._Plant.ValuationArea

Currency

公司代码货币

I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument._SalesOrganization._CompanyCode.Currency

CustomerName_Ship

客户名称（公司间）

I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument._ShipToParty.CustomerName

ShipToParty

客户（公司间）

I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.ShipToParty

TransactionCurrency

凭证货币

I_DeliveryDocumentItem._ReferenceSalesDocumentItem.TransactionCurrency

  新追加的计算字段如下：

Field

Field Desc

Formula

 Customer                    

 客户                        

 case when
   I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType = 'LF'
  OR  I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType = 'LR'
then I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.SoldToParty
else I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.ShipToParty
end                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         

 CustomerName                

 客户名称                    

 case when
  I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType = 'LF'
  OR  I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType = 'LR'
then I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument._SoldToParty.CustomerName
else I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument._ShipToParty.CustomerName
end                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        

 SO                          

销售订单                    

 case when
  I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType = 'LF'
  OR  I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType = 'LR'
then I_DeliveryDocumentItem.ReferenceSDDocument
else ''
end                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                

 SOITEM                      

销售订单行项目              

 case when
  I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType = 'LF'
  OR  I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType = 'LR'
then I_DeliveryDocumentItem.ReferenceSDDocumentItem
else ''
end                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            

 PO                           

采购订单                    

 case when
  I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType = 'LF'
  OR  I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType = 'LR'
then ''
else I_DeliveryDocumentItem.ReferenceSDDocument
end                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                

 POITEM                      

采购订单行项目              

 case when `  I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType = 'LF'`  OR  I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType = 'LR'`then ''`else I_DeliveryDocumentItem.ReferenceSDDocumentItem`end                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            

QuantitySold

销售数量(带符号)

case when

  I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType = 'LR'

  or  I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType = 'LLR'

then

  -1 * I_DeliveryDocumentItem.ActualDeliveredQtyInBaseUnit

else

  I_DeliveryDocumentItem.ActualDeliveredQtyInBaseUnit

end

Sign

销售数量符号

case when

  I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType = 'LR'

  or  I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType = 'LLR'

then -1

else 1

end

 

1.3      定义取值范围

Add a filter based on the following expression

I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.ActualGoodsMovementDate >= $parameters.P_MONTH_STARTDATE

 AND I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.ActualGoodsMovementDate <= $parameters.P_MONTH_ENDDATE

 AND(

    I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType = 'LF'

OR  I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType = 'LR'

OR  I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType = 'NLCC'

OR  I_DeliveryDocumentItem._DeliveryDocument.DeliveryDocumentType = 'LLR'

)

AND I_DeliveryDocumentItem.ActualDeliveredQtyInBaseUnit > 0

2     功能实现

2.1      创建Data Definition

首先创建一个Package，右键选择ZLOCAL > New > ABAP Package。

 

 

 

 

填写好Package的Name和Description，勾选Add to favorite packages方便后续查找。点击Next。

 

 

 

 

点击Next > Finish完成Package的创建。

 

 

 

右键创建好的Package，选择Other ABAP Repository Object。

 

 

 

 

输入并选中Data Definition，点击Next进入下一步。

 

 

 

 

输入I_DELIVERYDOCUMENTITEM进行搜索并选中，点击OK。点击Next > Next。

 

 

 

 

            选中Define View Entity，点击Finish完成CDS View的创建。

 

 

2.2      实现Data Definition

按照字段定义实现CDS内容。

 

 

 

 

            新追加的计算字段。

  

 

 

 

            定义取值范围。

 

 

 

 

            完成CDS View内容的填写后，保存，点击上方菜单栏的🕯激活，使类生效。

 

 

 

2.3      查看Data Definition

右键创建的Data Definition，选择Show In > Properties。

 

 

 

 

选中API State，再点击Add Release Contract。

 

 

 

 

选择Use System-Internally (Contract C1)，点击Next。

 

 

 

 

确保Use in Cloud Development和Use in Key User Apps都被勾选，点击Next。

 

 

 

 

 

再点击Next > Finish完成Add Release Contract。

 

 

 

 

在ADT中可以使用Data Preview来查看当前CDS的内容。连接到客户端100，右键创建的CDS View，点击Open With > Data Preview。

 

 

 

 

            在P_MONTH_STARTDATE和P_MONTH_ENDDATE后方按照YYYYMMDD的格式输入8位数字作为日期参数，点击Open Data Preview查看数据。

 

 

 

            根据输入的日期条件，会显示出符合条件的数据。

 

 

 

 

点击Parameter可以修改输入的参数，重新进行数据的筛选。

 

 

 

 

点击SQL Console可以查看进行查询的SQL语句，进行更改后点击Run会重新执行。

 

3. 结语


以上就是本篇开发案例的全部内容。希望该案例能让你更了解如三系统开发拓展的流程，希望您有所收获！

如果您对本文有任何的建议和想法，欢迎在评论区提出，期待与您一起交流。如果本文对您有任何帮助，欢迎您关注我的个人账号，期待我们在下一篇博文再见！

entry.title: Extend Upload Set with Table to Fiori Elements and utilize Object Store
entry.content:
Overview

In this article, I will introduce a sample program for SAP BTP that manages both text and file information. This guide should prove useful for those new to SAP BTP, like myself. Previously I posted Extend Upload Set to Fiori Elements and utilize Document Management Service with minimum TypeScript implementation.

Recently SAP CAP team was implemented @cap-js/attachments plugin that provides out-of-box attachment files support with SAP Object Store service. We do not need TypeScript implementation above using this plugin.

It is quite convenient for us, but I had some trouble in deployment. I would like to note how can I resolve deployment trouble for my follower to prevent such pitfall.

screenshot of sample program

 

  • Text is stored to SAP HANA Cloud database and file is stored to SAP Object Store service respectively.
  • Backend service is implemented by Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP) Node.js project.
  • User interface is implemented by Fiori Elements (List Report and Object Page), then automatically extend Object Page with SAPUI5 Upload Set with Table control. 

Sample code is hosted on a GitHub repository, and you are free to copy and experiment with it.

Note: Currently Object Store is available only in Free Tier environment, not in trial environment.

Note: I tested this on AWS subaccount. Maybe not working for other hyper scalers in current plugin version.

 

Development

Most of steps are same as my instruction post Instruction of implement-test-deploy flow for SAPUI5 plus CAP integrated with another services. And it is not difficult for you to follow instruction of @cap-js/attachments plugin. Key differences are:

  • Local testing by `cds watch` is utilizing in-memory database for both text and file. You do not need to setup for hybrid testing. 
  • Custom section to Fiori Elements is not required. Attachment section is automatically extended.
  • Need to use specific SAPUI5 version `1.121`. Both older (1.120.14) and newer (1.124.0) version are not working for the moment. (Memo).

 

Deployment to Cloud Foundry

Deployment configuration is also similar to my previous artifacts.

In production (Cloud Foundry) environment, we will store file object to Object Store (this is Simple Storage Service, aka S3 in AWS). To do this, we will describe Object Store service instance and bind it to Node.js application in `mta.yaml` file.

One more thing to care is `package.json` CDS configuration. To connect to above service instance with CDS, I will write cds properties:

 

 

  "cds": {
    "requires": {
      "kinds": {
        "attachments-db": {
          "impl": "@cap-js/attachments/lib/basic"
        },
        "attachments-s3": {
          "impl": "@cap-js/attachments/lib/aws-s3"
        }
      },
      "[production]":{
        ...,
        "attachments": {
          "kind": "s3",
          "vcap": {
            "name": "sap-sample-fiori-elements-uploadset-object-store"
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }

 

  • `kinds` property is for telling implementation of each kind (`db` is for local development, and `s3` is for production). I copied from here.
  • `vcap` under `attachments` property is for accessing service instance in Cloud Foundry (refer to CAP documentation). Service name should be matched with resource name in `mta.yaml` file. 

After setup configuration has done, you can `mbt build` and `cf deploy` to deploy to Cloud Foundry. You can upload and download files in Fiori Elements like below.

Upload and donwload file

 

Conclusion

It is quite convenient even this plugin is still beta version for the moment, and this is what I am wanting for years to quickly implement program dealing both text and file. I highly expect GA version.

If you have any feedback, please post reply and discuss with me.

entry.title: Re: How to bring your ABAP custom code to SAP BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content:
Hi Olga thanks for this information is very helpful. I have a few questions:

1.- We can move custom programs (code) to BTP but what happend with objects as custom tables, custom data elements, custom domains. How we can move those ojects to BTP?

2.- The abapGIT plugin implies an extra cost to the client or is a plugin that we can use or download for ecplipse without cost ?

3.- So, abapGIT plugin is the unique tool to move the custome code to BTP?

Thanks in advance

Regards

entry.title: Re: Project scheduling in SAP S/4 HANA Cloud, Private Edi...
entry.content: I appreciate your quick and kind answer. Let me ask one more question. How about in Public edition? Is there any solution for this as well? Thanks.

entry.content: We'd like to know choose different representative key in  custom CDS will have what impact.

entry.title: Re: How to clear the old assets value without depreciation
entry.content:
Hi Ernesto Cepeda,

Thanks for the reply.

But it doesn't help me to fix this issue. Our Client is using the ECC6.0 version still not using Hana/S4. The old asset stopped using after 2011. It was never depreciated and opened a new asset year for some reason. 

Please let me know if any alternate solution to clear and activate the current year.

Regards,

RajPal

But with the webapp test option everything is alright

entry.title: Re: Problem when run command fiori add deploy-config

entry.title: Re: Problem when run command fiori add deploy-config

entry.title: Usage and differences between MRS , RSH and FSM
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We are working on a requirement for  Resource Scheduling for one of our client.

SAP has 3 products available i.e. MRS , FSM and RSH.

Can someone tell me what are the usages of those and the differences between them? 

Thanks and Regards,

S Kumar

entry.title: Re: Two Sales Orders with One Freight Unit
entry.content:
Hi Jeffalcant

Good Morning!

Thank you so much for your reply. I tried two configuration that to prevent creation of Freight unit automatically after saves the sales order but its still creating Freight units with default freight unit type.

1. Removed FUBR from Logistics Integration Profile 

2. Removed Logistics Integration Profile from config - Define Transportation-Relevance of Sales Documents

Could you please provide more details on below points mentioned by you to proceed from myside.

1. Deactivate the auto creation of FU and use the report -  /SCMTMS/SUBSEQUENT_FUB_LOGINT

2. There is also an option not to create freight units immediately

Note: I heard that this report - /SCMTMS/SUBSEQUENT_FUB_LOGINT will be used to create freight units for sales orders which are created via EDI but not sure 100%. 

Once again thank you so much for your help on this.

Best Regards,

Naren

entry.title: Re: Buttons in custom column of list report fiori elements
entry.content:
Hi,

As said you could use expression binding or a path-based expression. Please see the fe V4 specific section "Enabling Custom Actions Defined via Annotations" in https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/topic/cbf16c599f2d4b8796e3702f7d4aae6c for details.

Best Regards,

   Sandeep

entry.title: Is there an option to write data to datasphere like a remark instead of a standard comment from SAC
entry.content: I have a requirement where I need to be able to annotate a section of story which can then again be responded to by other users. How can I achieve this within SAC. I am not working with a planning model instead it will be based on live connections from datasphere. Any inputs on this would be very helpful thanks.

entry.title: Re: Purchase request function not showing in SAP Business...
entry.content:
Hi,

Kindly check SAP Note 3228652. It is fixed in FP2208 or higher.

Check the same.

Kr,
Jitin

entry.title: Re: Display two related tables in a section of an object...
entry.content:
Hi,

This is definitely not a built-in feature in Fiori elements but I am wondering if the recent feature in Table Building Block that allows for dynamic filtering by setting of Selection Variant helps here! With this, you should be able to define two custom sections - each holding a table building block and based on selection in first, you should be able to do first a getSV() on the second table and add to it the new filter and then do a setSV() so that the second table is filtered with an additional filter now!

More details are in the section "Using the SelectionVariant Format" in https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/topic/3801656db27b4b7a9099b6ed5fa1d769.

Best Regards,

   Sandeep

entry.title: SAP Groups on LinkedIn
entry.content:
May I know what are the available official groups of SAP on LinkedIn?

@Sap

entry.title: OData Network Error when Using "SAP Build Apps Preview" Android APP (WebApp preview works fine)
entry.content:
Greetings from Perú!
I am a SAP Business One Certified Consultant and Working for a SAP Partner doing some research of SAP Build Apps Community edition. (we want to buy or use the SAP BTP version when we finish our research)

Initial conditions:

SAP Community Edition Builder

SAP Business One Server with Service Layer configured

Working OData integrations with my configured local server (working and tested with "Web Preview" Option) 

 

When i use the "Web Preview" Option the app use the OData integration and create the document in SAP Business One

But when i use the "SAP Build Apps Preview" Android APP
I catch the error in a toast message "Network Error"

 

Any help is appreciated.

entry.title: Re: How to Configure Dynamic Email in Output Parameter Determination App
entry.content: Hi @sven_hertig1, I see that the screenshot you pasted is for adding new column to the decision table. For adding condition, you need to click on the + icon you can see on left side of the popup in the back screen under the heading "Table Contents".

entry.title: How to add custom fields to app 'Monitor Production / Planned Order' (COOIS).
entry.content:
How to add custom fields at component level in app 'Monitor Production / Planned Order' (COOIS).


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to add custom fields to app 'Monitor Production /...
entry.content:
Create a custom field on the production order component level to show e.g. BOM related data.
Then this field can be seen in the COOIS component view. The business context is RESERVATIONDOCUMENTITEM.
See also KBA : https://me.sap.com/notes/3363122

entry.title: Re: What is the functionality of an Explicit trigger in A...
entry.content: Explicit trigger - usually is On Create or On Update of selected Entity type record. For Engagement Activity, it also has add to timeline.  For signal, it only has create, etc.

entry.title: Re: What is the functionality of an Explicit trigger in A...
entry.content: For button, I think it is just a place-holder for now.

entry.title: Re: How to Configure Dynamic Email in Output Parameter Determination App
entry.content:
Hi @Siraj_Saibudeen, It seems object dependent requirement. You need to check if any process exists for triggering email once the service contract is released. Or if you have already done it. Would you mind sharing some insights here?

Thanks,
Sachin

entry.title: Re: Audit LMS Administrators
entry.content: I have seen that you can buy custom reports to see Admin activity if that helps?

entry.title: Outbound Service Consumption Model Error - Failed to change codepage (OData V4)
entry.content:
Hi Experts ,

I was trying to create outbound service call for Bank API from SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

I have followed the step mentioned in https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/abap-environment-business-partner-outbound-call.html to create an Outbound Service Call via Service Consumption Model in Eclipse. 

I was able to successfully create Outbound Service and Communication Scenario for the same API.

I am facing this error: Error while parsing an XML stream: 'failed to change codepage', while trying to upload the EDMX Metadata file for the API of OData V4 type.

I tried the same for OData V2 (Business Partner) and it's working fine ✅.

Kindly assist me to resolve this error.

Thanks,
Akil

entry.title: Re: How to change approval priorities for To-Dos in Home...
entry.content:
Hello everyone, 
While searching for solution to this inquiry I found a relevant SAP Note: 3210447 - BADI (https://me.sap.com/notes/3210447/E) 

Please be informed, that to set different work item priorities based on your own custom logic for Procurement documents, you will need to realize it using BADi, BADI MMPUR_WFL_CONTEXT_ENHANCE. However this BADi is available only for Purchase Requisitions and not for Purchase Orders according to SAP response. 

Exerpt from the Note 3210447: The BADI MMPUR_WFL_CONTEXT_ENHANCE is only fully enabled for Purchase Requisitions. Setting a work item priority for Purchase Orders via the BADI is not yet enabled.

entry.title: GRC Tuesdays: Hidden Gems – Supporting US Partner Government Agency with SAP Global Trade Services
entry.content:
If you recall, June 2023 was filled with positive news: 4 Colombian children were miraculously found safe after surviving alone in the jungle for 40 days after their plane crashed; the Glastonbury music festival featured Arctic Monkeys, Guns 'n' Roses, and a surprise appearance from Foo Fighters; archaeologists in Pompeii uncovered a painting depicting what seemed to be the precursor of the pizza; South Koreans became one or two years younger as country dropped its traditional age-counting systems to align with international standards; the UN adopted the first-ever treaty to govern and protect international waters… and SAP released SAP Global Trade Services, edition for SAP HANA 2023!

Within this version filled with functional and technical enhancements, there is one that I’d like to focus on today as I believe it is a hidden gem: Support for US Partner Government Agency Import Filing.

 

What is Partner Government Agency (PGA)?

A Partner Government Agency (PGA) is a US government agency that operates alongside the Customs and Border Protection Authority (CBP), which regulates the export and import of goods into the United States.

The Partner Government Agencies belong to various U.S departments such as the Department of Agriculture, the Department of Health and Human Services, the Department of Commerce, the Department of Transportation, the Department of Justice, the Department of Interior, the Department of the Treasury, and the Environmental Protection Agency.

The PGA includes some of the following authorities:

  • Animal and Plant Health Inspection Service (APHIS)
  • Food Safety and Inspection Service (FSIS)
  • Foreign Agriculture Service (FAS)
  • Federal Drug Administration (FDA)
  • Consumer Product Safety Commission (CPSC)
  • National Marine Fisheries Service (NMFS)
  • Enforcement and Compliance within the International Trade Association
  • Office of Textiles and Apparel
  • Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, and Firearms (ATF)
  • Drug Enforcement Administration (DEA)
  • Environmental Protection Agency Import Guide (EPA)

… and more!

 

Why are they important for US trade compliance?

Well, it’s pretty simple: products regulated by Partner Government Agencies often require licenses or other additional documentation, which is why many PGAs have their own import guides.

It’s the responsibility of the importer to ensure that all mandatory prerequisites are met for importing into the US territory. Failure to do so might lead the relevant agency denying the import… De facto leading the U.S. Customs and Border Protection Authority to reject allowing the products to be introduced into US trade.

 

How can SAP Global Trade Services help?

The PGA information which can be reported through the Automated Commercial Environment (ACE) system is quite extensive and therefore organized in structures and fields.

Not all these structures and fields are supported by every authority, which is why each authority publishes an implementation guide with detailed instructions.

The product type determines which authorities regulate the import and this information can be derived from the foreign trade classification number of the product.

The Configurable PGA Record Maintenance activity in SAP Global Trade Services, edition for SAP HANA 2023 allows organizations to maintain all required PGA information for a product for all authorities and programs according to the foreign trade classification number and relevance code.

This data is then automatically transferred to the customs declaration item and can be changed.

Note: The agency and program specific format definition of structures and fields is not shipped out-of-the-box so must be maintained by the PGA experts of the company.

A PGA dataset defines the information to be sent for a specific agency and program. When the data set is created, a tree with all mandatory records for this agency and program appears. By choosing a record, the available fields (data elements) are displayed, and the desired values can be entered:

Once configured, this feature in SAP Global Trade Services can help automate the process for meeting PGA requirements and reduce manual steps leading to inefficiencies and potential errors.

If you are looking for more details on this feature, I would suggest referring to the dedicated section of the SAP Help Portal: Partner Government Agency (PGA) | SAP Help Portal

There is also a blog post from our partner Pinary on this topic that is well worth reading: Navigating Partner Government Agencies (PGAs) with SAP GTS

And if you are interested in learning more about SAP solutions for Governance, Risk, and Compliance, feel free to fill-in the demo request form!

entry.title: Re: Buttons in custom column of list report fiori elements
entry.content:
Plz review below code tried but didnt work 
const value =  [
                {
                    "Status": true,
                    "DocNum": "10001"
                },
                {
                    "Status": true,
                    "DocNum": "10002"
                },
                {
                    "Status": false,
                    "DocNum": "10003"
                },
                {
                    "Status": false,
                    "DocNum": "1008"
                },
                {
                    "Status": false,
                    "DocNum": "1009"
                },
                {
                    "Status": false,
                    "DocNum": "1010"
                },
                {
                    "Status": false,
                    "DocNum": "1011"
                },
                {
                    "Status": false,
                    "DocNum": "1012"
                },
                {
                    "Status": false,
                    "DocNum": "1013"
                },
               
                {
                    "Status": true,
                    "DocNum": "1054"
                },
               
                {
                    "Status": false,
                    "DocNum": "1058"
                },
               
            ]
            var buttons = new JSONModel({
            buttonArray: value
            });
            this.getView().setModel(buttons, "buttonApproveModel");

<core:FragmentDefinition xmlns:core="sap.ui.core"
    xmlns="sap.m">
    <!--Column 1 Cell-->
    <Button icon="sap-icon://approvals" text="Approve Vendors" enabled="{= ${buttonApproveModel>/buttonArray} === true ? true : false }"  press="approveVendorEmail" type="Emphasized"></Button>
</core:FragmentDefinition>

Looking forward to your reply.

BR 

Kimmy

entry.title: Re: Check the status the of Data manager package loads ru...
entry.content:
If you want users to be able to see something their access doesn't allow the best way is probably to change their access.

Alternatively you could delay upload processes  if others are running.

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to create a workflow with multiple tab...
entry.content:
Hi satoko_nakayama, 

   Currently you can only link a story to a calendar task, not a specific page. For your requirement, probably you need to use a story with only page you want your user to use from calendar. 

Best regards, William

entry.title: Re: Sorting in Editable smart table
entry.content:
Hello RaminS ,

Thanks for your response . You are right however , in our scenario the application is just used to simulate the scenerios on data and nothing is really saved back to DB. we neither have implemented draft . So based on answer i guess instead of using   below sinppet to sort 

var oCustomTable = this.getView().byId("customTable");
var oBinding = oCustomTable.getBinding("items");
var oSorter = new sap.ui.model.Sorter(<fieldName>, true/flase);
oBinding.sort(oSorter);

i will have to implement some custom sorting on client side . ? any reference would be helpful u  have one.

Thanks ,

Appu

entry.content:
Hi @RiccardoFassina ，

Just want to confirm whether the cards(uploaded via new way) are working at the beginning but no longer work after 1 week? If yes, we have already identified the issue and a patch is on the way. 

If it is not working after the upload, it may due to other issues like the role not setup properly. Please help to open a ticket. Thanks.

Abhiram

entry.title: Re: How to post CSRF Token to SAP Standard ODATA to perfo...
entry.content:
Raihan,
As per your comment i implemented the change and now SAP API is able to get a hit. now having 415 error as unsupported format, but when i simulate the payload and test the same with postman it is working, not sure why SAP response is http 415

entry.title: Not able to release Production order
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

My client wants to change production order component quantity in mass

I am changing production order component quantity using BAPI CO_XT_COMPONENT_CHANGE. After changing component, I am not able to release production order as system showing error that component not available.

But if I changed production order component quantity manually then it is possible to release production order (for same order type)

My issue is why production order release not possible if I change component using BAPI CO_XT_COMPONENT_CHANGE.

(Availability checking control configuration -Production Order release not possible if component not available)

Thanks in Advance.

Thanks & regards,

Ashish Gunjal

entry.content:

And, what is "Product - delivery-based" and so on?

②what is Delivry Rule in sales order?

And, what is "Single delivery - full quantity" and so on?

After logging in, I now see the following functions "active" and it is possible to use these functions. But this is exactly what I want to prevent. Is it possible to select "Favorites", "Edit View", "Workbook Filter" ,... from the Planning View ribbon to be hidden or deactivated in an active/selected planning view. Best Regards

Kr, Wouter

entry.title: Re: SU24 changes in Production system

entry.title: Re: Unable to get Modal Dialog box in SAP Build Apps

Hi,

Thanks for reporting and sorry for the trouble! 
This is a known issue and we are preparing a fix.
Hoping to get that released soon.

Best regards, Pekka

entry.title: Re: Employee referral function - need to add 2 documents
entry.content: Thank you for the confirmation!

entry.title: Vscode: Adaptation project for object page (How to preview/edit?)
entry.content:
Hi Community,

 

- The standard Fiori app  (F2229, Manage Purchase Requisitions ) requires adaptation to our needs

- We want to use the VSCODE adaptation project generator

- Setting up the Adaptation Project works fine so far.

- The preview and adaptation editor works fine for entry search pages ( like F1048), but...

- Preview and adaptation editor work not for the detail/object page (F2229) we need

- Within the adaptation editor we get the following message: 

"App could not be opened because the SAP UI5 component of the application could not be loaded.

Failed to load UI5 component for navigation intent "#app-preview""

I assume it is because we need to have an concrete purchase ID to open the corresponding Purchase-Page. 

 

Any Idea how to fix that or to setup vscode to preview/adapt the corresponding object page with a given purchase ID?  Is there some parameter we can add to the URL?

 

Somtehing like: http://localhost:8082/test/adaptation-editor.html?PurchaseRequisition=10000000  ?

 

Thanks, Chris

entry.title: RELEASE STRATEGY FOR REQUEST FOR QUOTATION (RFQ)
entry.content:
Release Procedure for RFQ

 

 

 

  1. Define characteristics
    a) RFQ_CEKKO_1

     


    b) RFQ_CEKKO_2

     

  2. Define Class: RFQ_EKKO


     



  3. Define or maintain Group

     



  4. Define Release Codes

     

  5. Maintain Release indicators ( if Required)

     

  6. Define Release Strategies

     

  7. Maintain Classifications

     

  8. Create RFQ ME41, ME43, ME45

     

     

     

     

     


    Mit freundlichen Grüßen,
    Pranav Bhusare
    SAP MM Consultant

entry.title: Re: Representative Key in CDS
entry.content:
Hello @liuteng1 
If you have only one single chart of accounts in your system and you change the representative key to the account only, then you will not have any impact.

If you have more than one chart of accounts, then it might be you overwrite the master data in your data target for the accounts which exist in more than one COA.

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: Provider Contract distribution to CC - SOAP error
entry.content:
Hi Anil,
I just want to add the S/4 part. If there are changes in authentication on CC side, you must delete the existing logical port and create it again with the correct authentication method in transaction SOAMANAGER.

Best regards,
Thomas

entry.title: Re: Two Sales Orders with One Freight Unit
entry.content:
Hi Jeffalcant,

Thanks for your email. 

There is also an option not to create freight units immediately

Could you please let me know how to deactivate FUBR (especially creation of Freight units automatically)

Thanks for your help.

Best Regards,

Naren

entry.title: Re: SAP ABAP RAP : Custom Entities with compositions relationship in a Fiori Elements App
entry.content:
Hi Vijay,

I suspect only 2 possible issues for now. 

  1. As the dump says, there are too many returned from the header entity but ideally there should be only one returned when navigating to the header object page.
  2. Some issues with the annotations listed in the comment section. 

We need to recheck the issue in debugging.

Best wishes,
Ramjee Korada

entry.title: SAP Data Analyst Certification
entry.content:
Certificates won’t get you a job in data analytics.

But you know what might?

The real world skills you gain in the process of getting that certification.

I fell into the trap of certification collecting earlier on in my data career, thinking the more the merrier!

But when it came time for interviews, no one ever asked me about any specific certifications I had on my resume.

Instead, they asked about the tools I learned, projects I built, and how I tied my learnings to my everyday job.

One certification that teaches you data analyst skills in the context of real world tools and business use cases is SAP’s Data Analyst Certification.

Its courses teach you everything you need to work in SAP Analytics Cloud–one of the most popular platforms for analytics and planning.

The best part: if you’re a woman, veteran, career changer, or in a minority group, you’re eligible to take this cert completely free.

Start learning today at 👉 https://learning.sap.com/certifications/sap-certified-associate-data-analyst-sap-analytics-cloud?cam...

entry.title: Re: SAP ABAP RAP : Custom Entities with compositions relationship in a Fiori Elements App
entry.content:
Hi @Muthu_raja 

Sorry for late reply. I missed the notification. 
Can you please confirm if you are using OData V2 or V4 ?

Please see point 4 in section 9 above.

Best wishes,
Ramjee Korada

entry.title: Re: Standard Single Host Installation of SAP ERP 6 EHP8 u...
entry.content:
I have created the user mockbuild and added the  user mock.

executed rpm -i compat-sap-c++-10-10.2.1-11.0.3.el8.src.rpm, didn't receive any error nor any message of installation completed.

However, even after freshly starting the SWPM installation, the error message remains same.

entry.title: Re: How to use EXIT in substitution OBBH if form paramete...
entry.content:
Hi Sandra,

 

Yes, I have restarted OBBH but still exit U102 is not in the list so that I can assign in substitution.

Regards

entry.title: Fetch data when clicked on ALV cell icon
entry.content:
Hi all,

When clicked on 'START' icon it should fetch Start Date and Start Time of respective row

When clicked on 'END' icon it should fetch End Date and End Time of respective row, how this can be done?

entry.title: Re: Manage BAS Users
entry.content:
Hi,

First, the API can provide you a list of dev spaces, not of users. List of permitted users can be viewed in the BTP account cockpit, by searching the users assigned with the Business_Application_Studio_Developer role.

Regarding authentication, the SAP Business Application Studio admin APIs can be either authenticated via browser login, or by adding a JWT token of the admin user that was initiated by browser login, as a request header. See example here for how to initiate the token and attach it to the API requests: https://help.sap.com/docs/bas/sap-business-application-studio/restart-dev-space
If you use some code / pipeline to trigger such requests, you must initiate this token (manually) first, and inject it (securly) to your script. Then this token can be used as long as it is valid (depends on your BTP account security settings).

Please note that the intention of the admin APIs is to enable admin operations on-demand for the specific scenarios mentioned in the documentation, and not to be run automatically / periodically. Also, make sure to use personal data retrieved from these APIs with care, and according to law.

Thanks,

Rotem
